summary: Flickering neon glow light text effect component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-neon-glow/src/TitleNeonGlow.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleNeonGlow` and `titleNeonGlowDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleNeonGlow` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Neon Glow Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-neon-glow to my project. Preserve the exported TitleNeonGlowProps API and register the TitleNeonGlow composition with the default props.
